data.content: Shipment review approved. Merge commit dde1d33933d4 is live on main. CI green (both CI and Coverage Badge workflows succeeded). All 5 rollback tests pass locally: non-zero exit rollback, take-loop step failure rollback, max-iterations rollback (the previously missing coverage), post-rollback invariant check, and concurrent abort during rollback. The max-iterations test at line 273 properly exercises the take-loop MAX_TAKE_ITERATIONS branch by driving 10 iterations and verifying rollbackBeatState is called. No regressions detected.
